display_description.he: הכנה ממוקדת לראיונות טכניים בחברות הייטק ישראליות, כולל תהליכי גיוס, שאלות נפוצות ומונחים טכניים בעברית
display_description.en: Prepare for technical interviews at Israeli tech companies with company-specific processes, question patterns, and Hebrew technical vocabulary. Use when getting ready for interviews at Israeli startups, enterprises, or multinational R&D centers, practicing system design questions relevant to Israeli tech products, or learning Hebrew terms used in technical discussions. Covers interview rounds, coding challenges, behavioral questions, and company culture expectations. Do NOT use for non-technical roles, academic interviews, or interviews at companies outside Israel.
